review_text: I recently bought this moisturizer from Daraz, and honestly  it has become my absolute favorite during my healing journey. ??? My skin had been through a rough patch with barrier damage, dryness, and sensitivity. I was desperately looking for something gentle yet effective  and this one delivered! The texture is super lightweight, non-greasy, and absorbs like a dream. No sticky feeling at all, just soft, nourished skin. What I love most is how calming and soothing it feels. With consistent use, Ive noticed my skin feels hydrated all day, less irritated, and just overall healthier. It pairs really well with the rest of my routine too  no pilling or clashes. Ive tried many moisturizers, but this one stood out because it didnt just sit on my skin  it repaired it. The ceramides and niacinamide in it actually helped rebuild my skin barrier and brought my glow back. ???? If you're someone whos struggling with dryness, a damaged barrier, or just wants a no-nonsense, effective moisturiser Id highly recommend giving this one a try. Im so glad I trusted this  worth every rupee! ?? Rating: 5/5 from me!

review_text: Totally unimpressed. Though delivery was expeditious, service was less than exemplary. In a conversation about the item, they state that it comes with a free bag, belt, and strings. None of these were included. When I contacted the vendor, they DM?d me and stated that these items were not included. I quoted the comment but got no reply. Nor did they reply to my question on the page. I have a screen shot as proof. The word ?kit? implies there are items included with the guitar, and it is standard to send a soft case with a guitar or ukulele. However, customers of this store don't even deserve the most basic of service. Nor do the sellers think they need to be transparent about their policies when answering questions. I have to wonder if the appalling service is because I?m a foreigner or a woman, and if the seller assumes I have no knowledge of guitars due to either of these factors. I would not suggest buying from such unscrupulous vendors. 0/10, would not recommend.

Nor did they reply to my question on the page. I have a screen shot as proof. However, customers of this store don't even deserve the most basic of service. Nor do the sellers think they need to be transparent about their policies when answering questions. Also the color is lighter than what appears in the photos.

review_text: I recently bought this moisturizer from Daraz, and honestly — it has become my absolute favorite during my healing journey. 🧴✨ My skin had been through a rough patch with barrier damage, dryness, and sensitivity. I was desperately looking for something gentle yet effective — and this one delivered! The texture is super lightweight, non-greasy, and absorbs like a dream. No sticky feeling at all, just soft, nourished skin. What I love most is how calming and soothing it feels. With consistent use, I’ve noticed my skin feels hydrated all day, less irritated, and just overall healthier. It pairs really well with the rest of my routine too — no pilling or clashes. I’ve tried many moisturizers, but this one stood out because it didn’t just sit on my skin — it repaired it. The ceramides and niacinamide in it actually helped rebuild my skin barrier and brought my glow back. 🌸💧 If you're someone who’s struggling with dryness, a damaged barrier, or just wants a no-nonsense, effective moisturiser I’d highly recommend giving this one a try. I’m so glad I trusted this — worth every rupee! 🩷 Rating: 5/5 from me!
